subject: Re: Lily Sanchez
body:

Hey..
I got your message about Lily Sanchez.. I don't have her home address anywhere. I only have her work info. Should I call anyone to see if they have it?
Also wanted to make sure you got the email I forwarded you from Sultan..
Just got to Dyer, Indiana. It's scary. I'm going back to NY tomorrow!
